30-topic consolidation course

Vocabulary Review

Revise every recommended collocation and phrasal verb from the full project through topic-based banks, Russian-to-English flashcards, pronunciation and controlled transformation practice.

30 topics2,850 expressions5,700 practice promptsBritish English audio

How to use the course

1. Choose one topicEach chapter keeps its own vocabulary set and progress record.
2. Review the bankRead the Russian meaning, definition and contextual example.
3. Retrieve from RussianUse flashcards before revealing the English expression and example.
4. Produce freelyWrite your own sentence using the target expression.
5. Upgrade a sentenceReplace a highlighted simple phrase with the advanced expression and rewrite the complete sentence.
